name: content-studio
description: A brand-voice-driven writer's room — six user-invoked skills (init, brainstorm, outline, draft, critique, headlines) plus six specialist agents (managing-editor, editor-in-chief, story-editor, staff-writer, copy-editor, headline-editor). Each piece gets its own folder under the configured output directory (draft.md, outline.md, critique.md, headlines.md), keeping all artifacts for one article in one place. Outputs in markdown, MDX, frontmatter+body, or HTML.

voice_guide_path.title: Brand voice guide path
voice_guide_path.description: Path (relative to project root) where the brand voice markdown file lives. /content-studio:init writes a starter template here if no file exists at this path yet.

output_dir.title: Output directory for drafts
output_dir.description: Directory where /content-studio:draft writes generated articles. Created on first draft if missing.

default_format.title: Default output format
default_format.description: One of: markdown, mdx, frontmatter, html. Used when the user doesn't specify a format inline (e.g. 'draft this as MDX' overrides per-invocation).

slug_prefix.title: Slug prefix (optional)
slug_prefix.description: Optional. Prepended to generated slugs in frontmatter (e.g. 'posts/' or 'blog/'). Leave blank if not needed.

author.title: Author name for frontmatter (optional)
author.description: Optional. Written into the 'author' frontmatter field when emitting 'frontmatter' or 'mdx' format. Leave blank if not needed.
